summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of BKNX Advisory corporate website. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly.

Cookie banner display and accept/decline functionality
Footer links navigation to all pages
Team member cards display on About page (5 cards found)
Testimonials grid on Testimonials page (13 cards found)
Service anchor links from home page to services page sections
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (15+ UI/integration tests passed)
